g.text: of a selected entry on the agenda
Selects a Team and Assigns it to the Selected Entry
Remember that in the previous referenced diagram,
ViewDetailsUI received entryDto from AgendaUI via
showEntryDetails and will continue to use it via this method: "assignTeamToEntry"
sendEmail(email, "Assignment Notification", "You have been assigned to an entry in the agenda.")
